locator.quote: is a FRACTION of stake, not £

text: stop_loss_pnl_threshold is a fraction of stake, not £ (2026-05-02 operator clarification); the first 0.5–2.0 sweep meant −£5 to −£20 and never fired.

locator.quote: The −£1.25 toll is ~76% a DIRECTIONAL loss from RIDING losers to the

text: The −£1.25 force-close toll is ~76% a directional loss from riding losers to the T−120 force-close; the actual close-cross is only ~£0.30.

locator.quote: bearing subtractor; inversion alone was roughly neutral or

text: E4b ablation: the stop_loss IS the load-bearing subtractor (E3+stop_loss alone matches E3+E4 to £2); inversion alone was roughly neutral.

locator.quote: PRICES — stop_loss fires once MTM has drifted 10% against the

text: Mechanism: stop_loss closes pairs at WORSE prices — it fires once MTM has drifted 10% against the pair, later than the agent's optimal earlier exit (earlier-but-bigger losses).

locator.quote: Also: stop_loss can auto-close pairs that would naturally have

text: Also: stop_loss can auto-close pairs that would naturally have matured profitably (a temporary mid-race MTM swing), killing them by premature force-close.
